facts: My client is a tenant facing eviction under the state Rent Control Act. Is a prior notice to quit under Section 106 of the Transfer of Property Act necessary before the landlord seeks eviction, or does the Rent Act make such a notice unnecessary?

A cheque given to my client was returned for insufficient funds. Where can a complaint under Section 138 of the Negotiable Instruments Act be filed, and which acts together constitute the offence of dishonour?

In a dowry cruelty case under Section 498A IPC the police made an automatic arrest of my client without recording reasons. What are the safeguards and guidelines restraining arrest under Section 41 CrPC?

My client's passport was impounded by the authorities without giving her any opportunity of hearing. Does Article 21 require a fair, just and reasonable procedure before personal liberty is curtailed?
Challenging the mandatory collection of biometric and personal data by the state. Is the right to privacy a fundamental right protected under the Constitution?
A woman employee was sexually harassed at her workplace and there is no statute governing the situation. What binding guidelines has the Court laid down to prevent sexual harassment of women at work?
A divorced Muslim woman is seeking maintenance from her former husband beyond the iddat period. Can she claim maintenance under Section 125 CrPC despite personal law?
The municipal corporation is evicting pavement and slum dwellers and demolishing their huts. Does the right to life under Article 21 include the right to livelihood?
A factory storing hazardous chemicals had a toxic gas leak that injured nearby residents. What is the liability of an enterprise engaged in a hazardous activity for such harm?
My client was arrested for a social media post under Section 66A of the Information Technology Act. Is Section 66A constitutionally valid in light of the right to freedom of speech?
In an international commercial arbitration seated outside India, can Indian courts exercise supervisory jurisdiction under Part I of the Arbitration and Conciliation Act?
Several undertrial prisoners have languished in jail for years awaiting trial without bail. Is the right to a speedy trial a facet of Article 21?
Challenging reservation in public employment that exceeds fifty percent and seeking exclusion of the creamy layer among backward classes.
A landlord seeks eviction of a tenant on the ground of bona fide personal requirement of the premises for his own occupation. What must the landlord establish?
